title: StudioDash Overview
description: Discover StudioDash, the native Mac and iPad analytics workspace that helps independent developers monitor apps, revenue, websites, and connected services from one place.
summary: StudioDash brings together app performance, revenue, website analytics, provider health, and operational insights in one native workspace for independent developers.

featureShowcases.heading: Your Developer Command Centre
featureShowcases.summary: Monitor your apps, revenue, websites, and connected services from one central dashboard.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash gives you a complete overview of your portfolio, helping you understand what needs attention before diving into detailed analytics. Instead of switching between multiple dashboards, everything starts from one focused workspace.
bullets: Monitor your apps, revenue, websites, and providers together.
Quickly identify issues, missing data, or providers that need attention.
Navigate directly to detailed analytics when you need more information.

image.caption: Everything starts from the StudioDash dashboard.

featureShowcases.heading: From Overview to Insight
featureShowcases.summary: Move naturally from a high-level overview into detailed analytics whenever you need them.
featureShowcases.body: Whether you're investigating revenue changes, App Store performance, website traffic, provider health, or synchronisation, StudioDash helps you reach the information you need without losing context.
bullets: Dedicated analytics for apps, revenue, websites, and integrations.
Keep every part of your portfolio connected.
Clear separation between live, unavailable, and planned features.

image.caption: Drill down into the details without leaving your workspace.

sections.heading: What Is StudioDash?
paragraphs: StudioDash is a native Mac and iPad analytics workspace from [BarkinMad Studios](/about), designed for independent developers who want a clearer view of their apps, revenue, websites, and connected services.

Bringing together App Store Connect, website analytics, advertising, provider health, and operational insights, StudioDash helps you spend less time switching between dashboards and more time building great products.

sections.heading: Who Is It For?
paragraphs: StudioDash is built for solo developers, independent creators, and small studios managing apps, games, websites, and multiple developer services.
If you regularly move between App Store Connect, analytics platforms, advertising dashboards, and website tools, StudioDash is designed to bring that information together in one place.
bullets: Developers looking for a single view of their portfolio.

sections.heading: Current Status
paragraphs: StudioDash is currently preparing for a controlled private beta before its public release.

Some features are already available, while others continue to evolve as development progresses. Throughout the website, planned functionality is clearly identified so you always know what's available today and what's still in development.
